items.name_en: 5NR461, New Mini Lucky Bag, made of imported vintage soft sheepskin, vintage distressed hardware, full of premium feel. The design is unique, with smooth lines. items.name_en: 6⃣️ colors available🍠🍠🍠 Large H real photos🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains, interpreting a sense of effortless high-end. In the rules of fashion, the word "wander" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casual and luxury. Design Highlights: Eclectic elegance, made from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather interwoven strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype that niche bags are impractical. Whether daily essentials or small items, they can be easily stored. Styling: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiteng, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm

items.name_cn:
661040🌷Original Goods🌷New Waist Pack Launch,
「New Release---MCM: Stark Visetos Waist Pack」
Made from coated canvas with a signature classic print. This functional Stark waist pack injects a stylish vibe into your look. Durable, adjustable signature fabric strap can be worn at the waist or crossbody, and two secure zippered compartments provide ample storage for your essentials.
Material: PU + Cowhide (Strap length 65-106cm)
Mini Size: 12X34X7cm
